name: Louise
description: Louise is one of the side protagonists of the Shadows House series and the shadow living under the care of the "Living Doll", [Lou](https://anilist.co/character/197877/Lou). Louise is sassy and confident. She loves to show off her Face, Lou, and has complete faith in her. She has multiple drawings of Lou posted on the walls in her room. Serious talk bores her and has been known to just want to have fun.

name: Lucy Tsukioka
description: Lucy is a classmate and friend of Suzu Kanade. She's a more silent and shy type, but she loves taking postworthy pictures of everything. She is usually always with Yayoi Toba.

name: Marika Mizushima
description: Marika is a member of the group [Merm4id](https://anilist.co/staff/301473/Merm4id). Marika is an easygoing girl with a comforting atmosphere. Besides being a university student, she also works as a model. She was the center of attention upon entering university, but she became friends with Rika, who was able to talk to her despite all the attention. She has a calm personality, but loves concerts and is dedicated to her DJ activities.

name: Ming Pei
description: Pei Ming, titled as General Ming Guang, is the Martial God of the North with nine thousand temples dedicated to his palace. He is one of the Four Famous Tales: "The General Who Broke His Sword", as well as a member of The Three Tumors.

name: Mio
description: Head maid of Kyros's household. She is polite and very no-nonsense, but looks after Marie with kindness; seeing she has such poor self-esteem that she has to constant direct her into not overreacting. Mio often investigates or goes undercover to find information for Kyros, leading to her leaving the estate to learn more about Marie's background.

name: Mio Kunosato
description: 3rd-year high school student. Never attends any lessons. She's quite tall and always wears a lab coat.

name: Momoka Sakurai
description: Momoka Sakurai is the protagonist of the manga series Wrist-Cut Transformation Subculture Menhera. Her name after transformation is Menhera Pink.

name: Mr. C.B.
description: __Height:__ 166 cm Bound by nothing! A cheerful and flawless Umamusume. A Umamusume who loves the free world of racing. The unbounded ambiance she exudes gives her a mysterious charm. At first glance, she appears to be free-spirited, but it's because she's stubborn and refuses to do anything she doesn't agree with. Surprisingly, she may be a bit clumsier than most other Umamusume.

name: Mutsuki Nakano
description: The oldest child in the family. She's good at cooking, studying, and sports. She's the perfect older sister at school and in front of her little sisters; however, she will only show her true colors to Haruki.

name: Nami Aoi
description: Sora's identical twin sister. When they were children, she'd often pretend to be Sora. Even through they look alike, their personalities are polar opposites. Unlike the quiet and mild-mannered Sora, she has a strong and stubborn attitude. She often forces Sora to cosplay for her own amusement. She's secretly in love with Kana. name: Narita Taishin
description: __Height:__ 145 cm A rebellious soul who is sharp as a tack. She was often teased for her small stature, so now she runs to prove her true abilities. Her coarse nature is a by-product of her disdain of being looked down upon. She is good friends with schoolmates [Winning Ticket](https://anilist.co/character/174852/Winning-Ticket) and [Biwa Hayahide](https://anilist.co/character/174851/Biwa-Hayahide).
